name: Bug Report
about: Report a detection issue, false positive, or unexpected behavior

labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Command used: `piiswap ...`
2. Input data (anonymize any real PII before sharing):
3. What happened:
4. What you expected:

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- piiswap version: [e.g. 0.2.0]
- Install method: [e.g. pip install -e .]

## Category
- [ ] False positive (something was anonymized that shouldn't be)
- [ ] Missed PII (something was NOT anonymized that should be)
- [ ] File format issue (parsing/output problem)
- [ ] CLI error or crash
- [ ] Other
